meaning: antihemophilic globulin[生化]抗血友病球蛋白
examples: The AHG itself was also titrated in isotonic saline by a master doubling-dilution technique.
Commercial companies took over much more of the AHG market, and the reagent became extremely avid and much more specific.
The raw AHG we used was derived from sheep, some of which, I was told, were so old that they had to be fed parenterally (again, I may have been fooled into believing this by naivety).
